title: panicum rigidum
intro: Panicum rigidum, also known as hard panic grass, is a type of perennial grass native to Australia and New Zealand. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Panicum rigidum include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe digestive issues, and support immune function. The plant is often prepared as a tea or infusion, or made into a tincture, and can also be used in topical applications to take advantage of its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties.
